Student Reality Lab AI

Can You Afford to Move Out After College?

Ask one question and get student-focused affordability answers backed by real rent and income data.

Checking mode... Your AI housing copilot for salary, rent, and city decisions

Data-backed answers Benchmarked against the 30% affordability line Built for students and recent grads

Ask the Affordability Assistant

Try: Can I live in Los Angeles with 60k? Compare Dallas and Atlanta on 55k.

Loading system status...

How It Works

Ask about your salary, rent, or city. The assistant retrieves relevant rows, explains the math, and shows affordability risk clearly.

Source: datasets/processed.json using Zillow ZORI rent and ACS income data.

Loading affordability data...

Affordability Evidence Panel

Use the charts to confirm which cities are hardest on young-adult budgets and whether rent stress is spreading.

Red marker = 30% affordability benchmark.

Horizontal bar chart with cities on the y-axis and rent burden percentage on the x-axis. A red marker shows the 30% affordability benchmark.

Line chart with year on x-axis and share of tracked cities above the 30% rent burden threshold on y-axis.
